HGSS.650.0001:
What? I can’t hear you very well.
I think we’ve got a bad connection.\f
Well, if you have something you want to
talk to me about, go somewhere else and\r
try calling again.
HGSS.650.0002:
Hello...
Oh, hi, how are you?\r
I’m doing fine, thanks.\f
HGSS.650.0003:
You know, there are Gym Leaders out
there who are stronger than me.\r
You should try battling them.\r
I don’t think you’d lose.
HGSS.650.0004:
I usually get up pretty early...
If we’re going to battle, I’m at my best\r
in the morning... How about you give me\r
a call on Monday morning!
HGSS.650.0005:
Oh, perfect timing!
I was starting to get bored...\r
Do you want to battle again? [0200,0000]
HGSS.650.0006:
Honesty is good.\f
So, I’ll meet you at the Fighting Dojo in
Saffron City, then?
HGSS.650.0007:
I see. Well, that’s how it’s got
to be...\f
If you ever change your mind, give me
a call.\f
Remember, I’m free on Monday mornings.
HGSS.650.0008:
Hmm. Do you really have the time to
battle me right now?\f
If you’ve got plans with other people,
you should take care of those first,\r
don’t you think?
HGSS.650.0009:
All right, I will see you at the
Fighting Dojo in Saffron City.\r
I won’t be late. Don’t worry!
HGSS.650.0010:
Yes, this is Pryce.
How are you doing?\f
HGSS.650.0011:
We made plans to battle at the Fighting
Dojo in Saffron City.\r
You didn’t forget, did you?\r
I’m waiting there for you.
HGSS.650.0012:
Just like one of my children...\f
No.\f
You’re more like one of my
grandchildren...\f
There’s such an age difference between
myself and the Trainers who defeat me\r
nowadays...\f
But you know, the strange thing is that
when I lose, I don’t feel disappointed.\f
I just feel happy.\f
Just happy that such talented Trainers
have come to see me.\f
...I just wanted to talk to someone
about that, so I called you.\f
That’s all.
HGSS.650.0013:
Do you know why they call me the winter
Trainer? Do you recall that my middle\r
name is “Willow”?\f
The willow tree looks like it withers in
winter’s cold. But really, it sprouts\r
dozens of new buds.\f
My fighting style is also strong just
like that...\f
It’s written in old books, you know.
You should look it up sometime.
HGSS.650.0014:
That reminds me, you kept Team
Rocket’s treachery in check, right?\f
Humph...
That’s a praiseworthy deed and an\r
appropriate responsibility for a Trainer\r
who could defeat me.\f
I think there’s still several things I
could stand to learn from you.\f
I’m looking forward to it.
